title: sterculia rubiginosa
intro: Sterculia rubiginosa, also known as the Karomia tree or Brown Karomia, is a species of plant in the family Sterculiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of the Sterculia rubiginosa plant have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In traditional medicine, the leaves can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are also used in poultices and ointments to promote healing and reduce pain.
